subject: Pawbie
sourceReference: Physical three-color product image: white, pink, and pale blue Pawbie units, with pink centered.

productFidelity.body: rounded-square fluffy blob body, not a perfect sphere
productFidelity.eyes: glossy blue-cyan electronic screen eyes with expression states
productFidelity.feet: small solid oval feet in a gray-white silicone material, not transparent
productFidelity.placement: static desktop companion; can be picked up but does not roam

avoid: fake logos, dates, badges, or claims
